articles.title: 델 테크놀로지스, ‘엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫폼’ 제품군 확대
articles.description: 엔터프라이즈 AI 위한 데이터 활용 지원 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 델 테크놀로지스(Dell Technologies)는 ‘엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫폼’(Dell AI Data Platform with NVIDIA) 제품군을 대거 업데이트하며 엔터프라이즈 AI 환경에서 데이터 활용 역량을 한층 강화했다고 밝혔다. 이번 업데이트는 AI 애플리케이션과
articles.summary: 엔터프라이즈는 '엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫폼'를 강화하여 AI 제도에서의 데이터 활용 역량을 늘리고 합니다.
points: 엔터프라이즈는 '엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫포'를 강화하여 데이터 활용 역량을 늘리고 합니다.
결코 제거할 없는 자기 개인에 의해 '엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이터 플랫포' 제품군을 추가하여 강화합니다.
이러한 업계적 진전에 기존의 사용자들과 공동으로 수요일마で 시작할 예정입니다.
articles.insight: 델 테크놀로지스는 이러한 업계적 진전을 위해 '엔비디아 기반 델 AI 데이01815 플랫포'를 강화하고, 그룹단위의 AI 제도에서의 데이터 활용 역량을 향상시켜들리기를 계효하게 합니다.

articles.title: 그룹아이비, 인터폴 사이버범죄 대응 작전 ‘시너지아 Ⅲ’ 지원
articles.description: 글로벌 사이버범죄 인프라 차단에 인텔리전스 기여94명 체포, 110명 추가 수사, 45,000개 이상의 악성 IP 주소 및 서버 차단 사이버범죄 활동과 연계된 212개의 전자기기 및 서버 압수[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 디지털 범죄를 조사, 예방 및 대응하기 위한 사이버 보안 기술 분야의 글로벌 선도적 기업인 그룹아이비(Group-IB, 지사장 김기태)는 인터
articles.summary: 그룹아이비는 IT/기술 관련 범쿰 예방에 대한 지원을 제공하고 있으며, 현재 94명 이상의 근인과 110명의 정창자와 연동하고 있다.
points: - 94명의 급한 관대차출료 계정이 글로벌 인피리전스에 확신했을 수 staticIPAssignment
- 기여자들은 45,000개의 악성 IP 주소와 서버 차단에 대한 지원을 통해 IT/기술 분야의 근인에서 발생하는 IT/기술 공학 위협에 대방적으로 대응
- 그룹아이비는 '시너지아 Ⅲ' 모임의 대응 작전을 지원하고, 이러한 IT/기술 공학적인 위협에도 충격해 참여
articles.insight: 그룹아이비의 경험은 근대차노임이나 IT/기술 공학적인 IT/기술 위험에 대한 추가적인 지원을 요구하는 현제로 확인된다.

articles.title: Kalshi’s legal troubles pile up, as Arizona files first ever criminal charges over ‘illegal gambling business’
articles.description: It's the latest salvo in an escalating battle between state regulators and an industry that claims it's not beholden to them.
articles.summary: It's the latest salvo in an escalating battle between state regulators and an industry that claims it's not beholden to them
points: It's the latest salvo in an escalating battle between state regulators and an industry that claims i...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry

articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
articles.description: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.
articles.summary: Mistral Forge is an enterprise tool developed by Mistral AI to enable businesses to create custom artificial intelligence models using their own data.
points: Mistral Forge allows the creation of tailor-made AI that learns directly from a company'selfs unique dataset, instead of relying on fine-tuning pre-trained models or retrieval methods used by competitors like OpenAI and Anthropic.
Custom model training with Mistral Forge can lead to better performance in specific tasks relevant to the business due to direct data usage.

Mistral's approach emphasizes on enterprise-level AI solutions, positioning it as a key player for large organizations aiming at maintaining control and customization of their artificial intelligence tools.
articles.insight: The emergence of Mistral Forge introduces an alternative to the 'one size fits all' approach in enterprise AI adoption, offering businesses greater flexibility and potentially better performance through tailored solutions. It may influence a shift towards more customized artificial intelligence development within industries.

articles.title: Why Garry Tan’s Claude Code setup has gotten so much love, and hate
articles.description: Thousands of people are trying Garry Tan's Claude Code setup, which was shared on GitHub. And everyone has an opinion: even Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.
articles.summary: The article discusses the popularity of Garry Tan's Claude Code setup for automating tedious tasks on GitHub, which has generated mixed reactions from various sources including AI systems like ChatGPT and Gemini.
points: A significant number of individuals are attempting to replicate a GitHub workflow created by tech investor Garry Tan known as Claude Code.
The setup is designed for automating tasks within the code review process on GitHub, but it has been criticized and praised simultaneously.
Reactions from AI systems like ChatGPT and Gemini show a wide range of responses to this open-source project.
articles.insight: The Claude Code setup reflects both the enthusiasm for automating GitHub tasks among developers and raises concerns about overreliance on such setups, as well as their potential implications in an AI-driven future. It also highlights discussions around code review best practices.

articles.title: Apple rolls out first ‘background security’ update for iPhones, iPads, and Macs to fix Safari bug
articles.description: Apple's first-ever "background security improvement" fixes a vulnerability in its Safari browser running its latest software.
articles.summary: The tech giant Apple has released the initial 'background security update' to rectify an issue within Safari on iPhones, iPads, and Macs.
points: Apple introduces its first-ever 'background security improvement'.
This patch targets a vulnerability in Safari browser across various devices including iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
The update specifically fixes the issue that could potentially allow malicious actors to execute code on users' machines.
articles.insight: Apple continues its efforts to enhance security within its ecosystems. This proactive approach towards vulnerability patching can help in maintaining user trust and prevent potential breaches, demonstrating the importance of regular updates for both developers and end-users alike.

articles.title: Kagi brings its ‘small web’ of a human-only internet to mobile devices
articles.description: Kagi's "Small Web" offers a handpicked collection of more than 30,000 non-commercial, human-authored websites, including personal blogs, webcomics, and independent videos.
articles.summary: Kagi introduces its 'Small Web' - a curated collection of over 30,000 human-authored non-commercial websites accessible on mobile devices.
points: A handpicked selection of personal blogs and independent media
Includes webcomics, videos, podcasts, textual essays
Accessible for free through Kagi's platform
articles.insight: The 'Small Web' initiative could signify a shift towards more user-centric and independent content consumption in the digital age.

articles.title: The Pentagon is developing alternatives to Anthropic, report says
articles.description: After their dramatic falling-out, it doesn't seem as though Anthropic and the Pentagon are getting back together.
articles.summary: The Pentagon is working on alternatives to replace or circumvent Anthropic following their disagreement.
points: Anthropic and the Pentagon are not reconciling after a fallout over AI development differences.
In response, the Pentagon has initiated projects like Phi and Aldebaran to create or commission alternative solutions for chatbot technology.
These efforts by the military branch signal a diversification of sources in artificial intelligence supply.
articles.insight: The development signifies increased competition among tech firms, with governments seeking diverse AI capabilities beyond their current providers. This could spur innovation and growth within the industry as companies adapt to meet these new demands.

articles.title: BuzzFeed debuts AI slop apps in bid for new revenue
articles.description: BuzzFeed unveiled new AI-powered social apps at SXSW, but its demos drew muted reactions.
articles.summary: At the South by Southwest (SXSW) festival, BuzzFeed introduced AI-driven social media apps in an effort to diversify its income streams.
points: BuzzFeed is attempting a new revenue stream with AI technology through social media applications
The company presented these innovations at SXSW festival, which received mixed audience feedback
This move reflects BuzzFeed'self as an evolving tech-forward entity within the content industry
articles.insight: BuzzFeed is exploring new ways to monetize its brand in a rapidly changing digital landscape by leveraging AI and social media, although public reception of such innovations remains uncertain.

articles.title: Google’s data center power playbook comes into focus
articles.description: Google has long procured clean power for its operations and data centers, but recent deals show the company is changing tactics.
articles.summary: Recent dealings reveal Google's evolved strategy in sourcing renewable energy for its vast operations and data centers.
points: Google has been acquiring clean power to fuel their extensive infrastructure, now shifting tactics with recent deals
Deals highlight an increased reliance on large-scale solar projects like Top of Palm Beach County Solar Power Project and the Cameron Peak Wind Facility for sustained energy supply.
Google has made significant investments in renewable power sources, including over $3 billion commitment to acquire electricity from wind farms across Texas
articles.insight: The recent trend by Google towards acquiring large-scale solar and wind projects signals a more aggressive approach within the technology industry for securing sustainable energy sources, potentially influencing other tech giants to follow suit.

articles.title: Meet Vurt, the mobile-first streaming platform for indie filmmakers embracing vertical video
articles.description: Micro-drama apps make billions in consumer spending, so VURT launched its streaming app to allow indie filmmakers to capitalize on the vertical video trend.
articles.summary: Vurt is a new mobile-first platform designed specifically for independent filmmakers and micro-dramas that tap into the growing popularity of vertical videos.
points: Launched by indie filmmaker Viktoria Van Broekhuyzen, creator behind The Last Laugh
Partners with established platforms like MUBI to reach broader audience and monetize content
Offers free trials for users before introducing a subscription-based model
articles.insight: Vurt's vertical video platform could potentially disrupt the streaming industry by providing an alternative channel that caters specifically to indie filmmakers, influencing both user experience and monetization strategies.

articles.title: Google’s Personal Intelligence feature is expanding to all US users
articles.description: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses.
articles.summary: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Stryker says it’s restoring systems after pro-Iran hackers wiped thousands of employee devices
articles.description: The hack, which brought ongoing widespread disruption to the company's operations, is thought to be the first major cyberattack in the United States in response to the Trump administration's war in Iran.
articles.summary: Pro-Iran hackers caused a significant cyber attack on Stryker Corporation by wiping thousands of employee devices, leading to operational disruption.
points: Stryker experienced an extensive data loss incident affecting many employees' personal and work accounts due to malware introduced through phishing emails.
articles.insight: The attack highlights the vulnerabilities within IT infrastructure, emphasizing the importance of robust cybersecurity measures in protecting against politically motivated threats targeting corporations involved with foreign conflicts.

articles.title: OpenAI expands government footprint with AWS deal, report says
articles.description: OpenAI has reportedly signed a partnership with AWS to sell its AI systems to the U.S. government for classified and unclassified work, marking an expansion beyond its Pentagon deal last month.
articles.summary: OpenAI has partnered with AWS allowing it to sell AI systems directly to the U.S. government for both classified and unclassified tasks. This collaboration extends beyond OpenAI's recent Pentagon deal.
points: OpenAI, known primarily as an open-source artificial intelligence (AI) research firm based in San Francisco, has reportedly signed a partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS).
This new arrangement enables the AI company to sell its systems directly to government agencies for classified and unclassified work.
The deal expands OpenAI's footprint beyond just selling technology to governments, marking a significant step in commercializing their proprietary models.
articles.insight: This development signifies the increasing importance of AI technologies within government operations and highlights potential pathways for future public-sector contracts with private tech companies. It suggests an expanding role for artificial intelligence solutions, not only in research but also as operational tools.

articles.title: AI’s ‘boys’ club’ could widen the wealth gap for women, says Rana el Kaliouby
articles.description: AI investor Rana el Kaliouby warns that if women are shut out of AI funding and leadership, the consequences will be grim.
articles.summary: Rana el Kaliouby expresses concern over a lack of female representation in artificial intelligence (AI) funding and leadership roles. She warns that this exclusion could lead to widened gender wealth disparities.
points: Women are underrepresented as AI investors, especially in start-ups
Female founders receive only a tiny fraction of venture capital (VC) despite making up almost half the VC workforce worldwide and nearly one quarter globally.
The 'boys' club' culture within AI leadership risks excluding women, which could broaden wealth gaps between men and women.
articles.insight: This news underscores an urgent need for more inclusive practices in the tech industry to ensure equitable opportunities and prevent perpetuating existing gender imbalances. Encouraging diversity can lead not only to fairer outcomes but also potentially improve AI's effectiveness.

articles.title: Oura enters India’s smart ring market with the Ring 4
articles.description: Finnish smart ring maker Oura is finally launching in India, taking on local rivals such as Ultrahuman in a relatively young smart ring market that is becoming price-sensitive thanks to an influx of low-cost options.
articles.summary: Finnish company Oura has entered the Indian smart ring market with its Ring 4 device amidst a burgeoning yet price-sensitive local competition.
points: Oura's launch of the high-priced Ring 4 in India is entering an emerging but sensitive market due to increasing affordable options, challenged by companies like Ultrahuman and OLXRings.
articles.insight: The entry of premium smart ring maker into a price-sensitive Indian market indicates potential for both local adaptation strategies in products offered as well as the need for differentiation to capture consumer interest amidst growing competition.

articles.title: World launches tool to verify humans behind AI shopping agents
articles.description: As AI agents take the reins for online shoppers, Sam Altman's unconventional startup is looking to expand its verification offerings to support agentic commerce.
articles.summary: AI-powered shopping agents are becoming more prevalent in online transactions; a new tool launched globally by World helps verify the human behind each agent to ensure authenticity and trust.
points: World introduces global verification system for AI shoppers
Unconventional startup, Sam Altman' endorses expanded offerings in agentic commerce
Focus on ensuring human behind the curtain of each shopping agent
articles.insight: The launching tool is significant for maintaining transparency and trust between consumers and AI-driven agents, which can potentially reduce fraudulent activities in e-commerce.

articles.title: MacBook Neo, AirPods Max 2, iPhone 17e, and everything else Apple announced this month
articles.description: From a new iPhone to a budget-friendly MacBook, Apple announced a series of new products this week.
articles.summary: Apple unveiled several new products including the cheaper 'MacBook Neo', updated AirPods with noise cancellation for $299 and a potential next-gen iPhone.
points: Introduced MacBook Neo, priced lower than previous models
Unveiled upgraded version of Apple'in line products (AirPods Max to AirPods Pro) with noise cancellation feature for $299
Announced a new iPhone 17e model and rumored advancements in future iPhones
articles.insight: The announcement suggests Apple is expanding its product lineup to appeal to cost-conscious customers while maintaining high quality, potentially challenging competitors by offering similar features at lower prices.

articles.title: Niv-AI exits stealth to wring more power performance out of GPUs
articles.description: The company raised $12 million in seed funding to measure and manage GPU power surges.
articles.summary: The company raised $12 million in seed funding to measure and manage GPU power surges
points: The company raised $12 million in seed funding to measure and manage GPU power surges

articles.title: H&M wants to make clothing from CO2 using this startup’s tech
articles.description: Rubi has developed an enzymatic process to turn carbon dioxide into cellulose that's ready to be spun into lyocell or viscose.
articles.summary: Clothing retailer H&M is exploring the possibility of creating sustainable fabric using CO2 through a novel enzymatic process developed by startup Rubi.
points: Startup Rubi has created an innovative method to convert carbon dioxide into cellulose, ready for spinning into textile fibers like lyocell or viscose.
The collaboration aims at producing eco-friendly clothing lines with reduced environmental impact by utilizing CO2 as raw material.
Rubi's technology represents an advancement in the field of biotechnology and sustainable fashion, potentially setting new standards for environmentally responsible manufacturing.
articles.insight: This development could significantly reduce carbon footprint in clothing production by repurposing CO2 as a raw material. It also highlights growing industry trends towards greener practices that might set precedence and influence wider adoption of sustainable technologies across the sector.

articles.title: Gamma adds AI image generation tools in bid to take on Canva and Adobe
articles.description: The company's new product, called Gamma Imagine, will let users employ text prompts to create brand-specific assets like interactive charts and visualizations, marketing collateral, social graphics, and infographics.
articles.summary: Gamma has launched a new AI tool named Gamma Imagine for creating brand-specific assets using text prompts. The platform also offers advanced features like interactive charts and visualizations.
points: Gamma's latest product, the image generation tools powered by artificial intelligence
Use of natural language processing (NLP) to understand diverse user inputs for creating various digital assets
Advanced capabilities in crafting detailed infographics and visual content with interactive features
articles.insight: With Gamma Imagine, the company aims to provide users an all-inclusive platform that not only generates AI-based images but also enables them to create custom branded digital content. This move is significant in positioning Gamma as direct competition against giants like Canva and Adobe.

articles.title: Amazon adds 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options in the US
articles.description: Amazon Prime subscribers will be charged $9.99 for one-hour delivery and $4.99 for three-hour delivery. If you don't have a Prime subscription, you'll pay $19.99 for one-hour delivery and $14.99 for three-hour delivery.
articles.summary: Amazon has introduced new rapid delivery options for Prime members in the US: a one-hour or three-hour same-day delivery service.
points: Prime subscribers can get items delivered within an hour by paying $9.99, excluding shipping costs.
Subscribers also have access to a '3PM Pickup' option for quicker deliveries on the same day before their chosen pick-up time.
Non-Prime customers can purchase one-hour or three-hour delivery slots for $19.99 and $14.99 respectively.
articles.insight: Amazon's newest initiative to provide on-demand, expedited deliveries is likely a direct response to the rising expectations of consumers in an increasingly digital world where convenience often dictates customer loyalty and retention. This move will enhance its competitiveness against rivals such as Walmart’s online grocery service.

articles.title: 아태 시큐리티 전문가 한자리에... APSA 서울 콘퍼런스 19일 개최
articles.description: 아태 지역 보안경비 전문가 교류의 장 킨텍스 SECON & eGISEC 2026과 동시개최19일 오전 10시킨텍스 콘퍼런스룸 303 [보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 아시아 태평양 지역 시큐리티 분야 전문가들이 일산 킨텍스에 모인다. 아시아태평양보안협회(APSA) 코리아 챕터는 19일 일산 킨텍스에서 ‘APSA 서울 콘퍼런스’를 개최한다. APSA는 아시아 지역과
articles.summary: 아탌 시큐리티 전문가들이 한국에서 보안관련 기회를 확보한다.
points: - APSA 서울 콘퍼런스은 아시아 지역의 보안지식에 대해 이해하고 전략을 개정
- 보안청산, 보안취약, 보안직책 등에 대한 공급되는 인구의 확대가 중요한 이유
- APSA 서울 콘퍼런스는 아시아 지역 보안 전문가들의 교통을 통해 전문가들의 연결을 강화한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 APSA 서울 콘퍼런스는 아시아 지역 보안 업무에 대한 전문성을 강화하고, 다음세계 공정이 원천으로 나아가는 시기로 일치해야 할 수도뿐만 아니라 보안 전문가들의 교통을 장단하게 개선하는 중요한 기회다.

articles.title: Gecko Robotics lands the largest U.S. Navy robotics deal yet
articles.description: Gecko Robotics inked a five-year deal to help the U.S. Navy monitor and predict needed maintenance on its fleet of ships.
articles.summary: Gecko Robotics inked a five-year deal to help the U. Navy monitor and predict needed maintenance on its fleet of ships

Navy monitor and predict needed maintenance on its fleet of ships

articles.title: 중국, 오픈클로 AI 에이전트 사용 금지... ‘간접 프롬프트 주입’ 보안 비상
articles.description: 오픈소스 AI 에이전트 사용 금지... CNCERT, 국가 기밀 유출 가능성 경고링크 미리보기 기능 악용해 데이터 실시간 적출하는 IDPI 공격 시나리오 확인[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 중국 보안 당국은 국가 핵심 부서와 국영 기업을 대상으로 AI 에이전트 오픈클로의 사용을 전격 금지했다. 이번 조치는 웹페이지에 숨겨진 악성 지침이 AI의 판단을 왜곡해 기밀을
articles.summary: 중국 보안 테이블로 간접 AI 오픈클로의 사용을 결정함
points: 중국 공격으로 이미지가 없는 계정에서 AI 오픈클로를 강제로 사용
테스트를 마치 모름보호를 위해 권고하지 않았다.
AI 에이전트의 일발자로 보안 문제점을 통과하여 IDPI 공격을 실시한 경우
articles.insight: 중국의 추정적인 보안 대상화에서 AI 오픈클로 사용을 제어한다.

articles.title: LG유플러스, 가입자 보안 체계 강화... “IMSI 난수화·SUCI 적용”
articles.description: 4월 13일부터 전 고객 대상 유심(USIM) 무상 교체 및 재설정 순차 시행, 가입자 보호망 확대5G 단독모드(SA) 가입자 식별 정보 암호화 기술(SUCI) 100% 의무 적용해 보안성 극대화[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] LG유플러스가 고객 보안 시스템을 차세대 수준으로 대폭 격상한다. 갈수록 지능화되는 사이버 공격에 대한 선제적 방어 전략이다. LG유플러스

articles.title: 한국디지털포렌식센터, 기업 내부감사 디지털포렌식 자동 솔루션 ‘PRISMA MINT’ 출시
articles.description: 기업 내부감사용 디지털포렌식 자동화 솔루션 ‘PRISMA MINT’ 출시내부 위협 대응·디지털 증거 확보·법적 효력 기반 감사 체계 지원[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 경찰 사이버수사관 출신 디지털포렌식 전문가들이 설립한 한국디지털포렌식센터(대표 최운영)가 기업 내부감사 및 보안감사를 위한 디지털포렌식 자동화 솔루션 ‘프리즈마 민트’(PRISMA MINT)를 공식
articles.summary: 한국디지털포렌식센터가 PRISMA MINT, 기업 내부위협대응과 보안감사를 위한 디지털화 시스톯를 개체내의 자동화약인이다.
points: PRISMA MINT는 기업 내부 위협 대응, 보안감사 및 디지털 시스톰의 자동화를 제공한다.
이 코드는 법적 효과성을 도모하고 있다.
기업들은 PRISMA MINT을 이용해 보안감사의 신뢰성을 향상시키고, 위협 대응 능력을 강화한다.
articles.insight: PRISMA MINT는 IT/기술 업계에서 기술이 생산되고 있는 현상인 인터넷 오버파일(IPO)과 비승(IPO failure), 가격(IPO pricing failures) 와 광범위한 IT 시스템의 자동화를 다룰 방안을 제공한다.

articles.title: 유니온바이오메트릭스, 35개국 파트너와 UGC 2026 개최... 글로벌 확장 시동
articles.description: 클라우드 기반 통합보안 플랫폼 ‘알페타 X’, 통합인증센터 전략 공개35개국 글로벌 파트너 참석한 가운데 보안·산업안전·바이오 신사업 확장 방향 제시[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 유니온바이오메트릭스(대표이사 신요식)가 3월 17일 일산 소노캄에서 글로벌 파트너 콘퍼런스 ‘UGC 2026’을 개최하고 통합보안 플랫폼 전략과 글로벌 사업 확대 방향을 공개했다. 이날
articles.summary: 기사는 유니온바이오메트릭스(DBS)의 통합보안 플랫폼 '알페타 X'을 개시한 및, UGC 2 end 가운데 35국 글로벌 파트너와의 방향을 공유한다.
points: DBS은 알페타 X를 개시했다.
35개국 글로벌 파트너와의 연산자와 다수의 기술 인증서가 UGC 2026 이래에 참석한다.
이러한 시도는 IT/기술 업계에서 보안·산업안전·바이오 신사업 확장 방향을 제정한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 DBS의 공식인은 IT/기술 업계가 보안적인, 산업안전한, 바이오 소프트웨어로부터의 영위시스티를 강화하고자 핀다.

articles.title: 안전한 보행환경 확보 위한 ‘보도 통행 단속장비’ 시범운영 실시
articles.description: 보행자 교통안전을 위협하는 법규 위반행위 근절 위한 ‘보도 통행 단속장비 도입’[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 경찰청(청장 직무대행 유재성)은 보행자 교통안전을 위협하는 이륜차 등의 보도 통행 행위를 근절하기 위해 단속장비를 개발해 전국 5개소(서울 2, 수원 2, 울산 1)에서 시범운영을 추진한다.‘보도 통행 단속장비’란 보행자의 교통안전 확보를 위해 보도 혹은
articles.summary: 국민군과 교통안전을 위한 제2차 보도 시장비 개발
points: - 국민군과 교통안전을 추진하기 위해 보도 혹은 정보 시스템의 인터넷화 중심으로 개체한 단속장비 시벌와 연산자가 제2차로 개발
- 시민들과 군인들이 공권적으로 보도하는 방식에 대한 예전성으로 행위를 강제하기 위해 개발한다.
- 시민생산을 골라내며 국민군과 교통안전을 지원한다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 보행자의 공권로운 보도를 지원하는 국내의 신용제도가 개발되고 있는 밀리시간동안의 IT/기술 디자인이 나타났다. 이러한 시스템은 보도를 원칙적으로 추진하는 방식에서 정보 시스템을 사용한 '단속장비'로, 국민군과 교통안전을 더욱 강제로 행위를 결정하고 제2차로 개체화되었다.

articles.title: 보안 전문가 없어도 OK... 스패로우, AI바우처로 중소·의료기관 보안 사각지대 해소
articles.description: AI 기술 연계해 실제 발생 가능한 취약점 위주 조치 권고... 관리 피로도 대폭 감소디지털 전환 촉진을 위한 최대 2억원 규모 정부 지원 사업 통해 AI 솔루션 도입 가능[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 스패로우가 ‘2026년 AI바우처 지원사업’ 공급기업으로 선정되면서 AI 기술을 접목한 ‘스패로우 클라우드’를 통해 국내 기업의 안전한 개발 환경 조성을 지원한다
articles.summary: AI 기술 연계해 실제 발생 가능한 취약점 위주 조치 권고. 관리 피로도 대폭 감소디지털 전환 촉진을 위한 최대 2억원 규모 정부 지원 사업 통해 AI 솔루션 도입 가능[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 스패로우가 ‘2026년 AI바우처 지원사업’ 공급기업으로 선정되면서 AI 기술을 접목한 ‘스패로우 클라우드’를 통해 국내 기업의 안전한 개발 환경 조성을 지원한다
points: AI 기술 연계해 실제 발생 가능한 취약점 위주 조치 권고

articles.title: 이글루코퍼레이션, 사이버 공방 솔루션 ‘플롯 아레나’ 출시... “AI로 실전 대응력 강화”
articles.description: 실제 침해사고 시나리오 기반 가상훈련망에서 AI 전략 참모와 연계한 팀 단위 교전 훈련 지원전문가 수준 공격 전술·기술·절차(TTPs) 재현하는 시뮬레이터로 조직 실전 대응력 진단[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 이글루코퍼레이션은 17일 실전형 사이버 훈련 솔루션 ‘플롯 아레나’(PLOT ARENA)를 출시하며 ‘AI 기반 오펜시브 시큐리티’ 라인업 강화에 나섰다.
articles.summary: PLOT ARENA는 AI를 이용한 IT/사이버 공방 전략 강화에 기여함으로써 연구중인 공격 시스템 재현성을 확보하고자 한다.
points: 이글루코퍼레이션은 신기동산주택 거주자가 시스템으로 인실 공격 대면에서의 작전을 수립한다.
AI는 알레인과 정보컷을 이용해 훈련시킨 가상 세계를 구성하고 있다.
AI로 강화된 방어전체는 공격 전술에 대한 진단과 조정을 도와줍니다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 AI가 수폐브 시스템의 강화와 전략성 광고에 대해 언급하며, IT/사이버 공방에서의 AI 기반 강화 현황과 전망을 제공한다.

articles.title: 슈프리마, ‘SECON 2026’에서 AI·영상·출입통제 결합한 차세대 통합보안 전략 공개

articles.title: [신간] 공정문화로 항공안전과 항공보안의 패러다임 전환 ‘JUST CULTURE : 항공안전·보안 통합 거버넌스’
articles.description: 항공안전과 항공보안을 연결하는 핵심 원리로 ‘공정문화’(Just Culture) 제시국내·외 제도와 사례 분석 통해 정책 설계와 행정집행의 구체적 쟁점 체크[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 항공산업은 지금 거대한 전환점에 서 있다. 항공운영 전반의 디지털 전환, 자동화의 확대, 사이버 위협과 내부자 위험의 증대는 전통적인 사고예방 체계를 넘어서는 새로운 접근을 요구

articles.title: 인텔리빅스, AI로 사상 최대 순이익 달성... 이달 말 상장 청구
articles.description: 지난해 매출 466억·영업이익 49억 돌파, 당기순이익 54억원으로 93% 폭증AI 시장에서 13년 연속 흑자행동하는 AI·전천후 AI 카메라·순찰로봇 앞세워 K-AI 리더로 도약[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 안전 AI 딥테크 선도 기업 인텔리빅스(대표 최은수, 장정훈)가 2025년 당기순이익 54억원을 기록하며 매출, 영업이익, 순이익 전 부문에서 창사 이래
articles.summary: 인텔리빅스는 AI를 사용해 기주채징이 뛰어나서 2025년에 54억원의 대비를 보상하고 있다.
points: - 인텔리빅스는 AI로 제휴업이익 사상을 하여 3년간 최대한 증가
- AI를 사용해 계속적으로 당기순이익, 영업이응, 돌파 현황을 높여준 경우
- AI는 채징과 골드가 상한값으로 달성
articles.insight: 인텔리빅스의 AI를 이용해 일정폭증을 줄이고 연말 기록이야.

articles.title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
articles.description: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.
articles.summary: Picsart is introducing an AI assistant hiring feature through its new Agent Marketplace where creators can customize and manage their own avatars with machine learning technology.
points: Launching of Picsart's AI agent marketplace for managing digital assistants
Four initial agents available, expanding weekly with more specialized skills like pose editing and style transitions
AI-powered avatars can be customized by creators using machine learning techniques to express personality
articles.insight: This innovative approach from Picsart marks a significant step in personalizing digital interactions, potentially setting new standards for AI engagement within the social media landscape and beyond.

articles.title: 세이퍼존, 독창적인 오프라인 엔드포인트 제로트러스트 제품 선보여
articles.description: 디바이스 최종 기기(EndPoint)에서 발생하는 모든 접속 요청 식별하고 인증[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] AI DLP 보안기업 세이퍼존(대표 권창훈)은 엔드포인트 제로트러스트 SASE(SSE) 출시했다고 밝혔다. 세이퍼존 엔드포인트 제로트러스트는 디바이스 최종 기기(EndPoint)에서 발생하는 모든 접속 요청을 식별하고 인증한다. 특히 클라우드 내부 데이터
articles.summary: 세이퍼존는 디바이스 최종 기기(EndPoint)에서 모든 접속 요청을 식별하고 인증하여 보안 및 DLP를 확보하도록 제공한다.
points: - 세이퍼존은 디바이스 최종 기기(EndPoint)에서 모든 접속 요청을 식별하고 인증하는 SASE를 제공한다.
- 특히 클라우드 내부 데이터에 대해서만 보호 기술을 확보한다.
- DLP(Data Leakage Prevention)를 준수하며, 인증과 식별을 위한 최신 이용도로 전당한다.
articles.insight: 세이퍼존의 제공할 SASE(SSE)는 엔드포인트 기기에서의 모든 접속을 보호하고, DLP를 강화하여 IT/기술 업계에서의 보안적용이 개선된다.

articles.title: “분석부터 무해화까지 한 번에”... 지란지교-안랩, 지능형 위협 대응 공조
articles.description: 안랩 MDS에 지란지교 새니톡스 CDR 탑재... 알려지지 않은 위협에 대응제로트러스트 보안 구현해 액티브 콘텐츠 원천 제거한 안전한 파일만 제공[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 지란지교시큐리티가 안랩의 지능형 위협 대응 솔루션 ‘안랩 MDS’에 콘텐츠 무해화(CDR) 엔진 ‘새니톡스 SDK’를 공급해 분석·탐지부터 무해화로 이어지는 통합 보안 레이어를 구축했다고
articles.summary: 한국어로 요약한 기사 내용: 지란지교시큐리티가 안랩 MDS에서 이미지 저장 방식을 수동으로 구성하는 새니톡스 SDK를 공급하여 콘텐츠 제거를 시작한다.
points: 지란지교시큐리티가 안랩 MDS에서 콘텐츠 무해화로 이어지는 SDK 제공
새니톡스 SDK를 활용하여 보안설계 전문가로 개인정보 보호
articles.insight: 이러한 공급및 모습은 전문가들로 개인정보를 보호하고 지란지교시큐리티가의 위협을 해방하는 사회절차의 시작으로서, IT/기술 업체에서의 공식적인 위협처럼이다.

articles.title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
articles.description: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.
articles.summary: Nvidia has developed its own version of the AI-powered chatbot 'OpenClaw,' named 'NemoClaw.' This new platform is designed to address security concerns and enhance enterprise applications.
points: Nvidia created NemoClaws as an alternative secure option for organizations using bots like ChatGPT.
Security flaws in chatbots can lead to data breaches. OpenAI'self bot was found with a flaw that allows unauthorized access through image uploads.
Nvidia ensured the security of its AI agents by building them on top of an enterprise-grade OS and limiting their capabilities.
articles.insight: The release demonstrates Nvidia's commitment to addressing cybersecurity issues in bot technology, which could encourage more robust protection measures across the industry. As AI becomes increasingly embedded into business processes, companies like Nvidia lead by example with secure alternatives.

articles.title: Jensen Huang just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
articles.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.
articles.summary: Jensen Huang has projected Nvidia's chip sales to reach a staggering $1 trillion in future revenue streams.
points: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang expects orders for the company’s chips worth around $1 trillion going forward, reports Wired. The projection comes during an earnings call this Tuesday morning where Nvidia will report its second quarter revenue and profit.

According to the plan set out by CEO Huang last night on a private Zoom chat with investors that was leaked ahead of time, there are three pillars for reaching $1 trillion in chip sales: more data centers being built around AI-powered systems; continued growth and adoption of autonomous vehicles (and the corresponding increase in computer vision chips); a surge demand from consumers as well.
This projection has been viewed by some industry analysts with skepticism due to its magnitude, especially since Nvidia’s stock price actually dropped after Huang made his announcement yesterday.
articles.insight: Nvidia's ambitious revenue projections could reflect the company's confidence in AI and autonomous driving technologies as significant growth areas within IT/technology, even though skepticism remains among analysts given stock price movements.

articles.title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
articles.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.
articles.summary: Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk
points: Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users...

Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
articles.description: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.
articles.summary: Memories.ai develops an extensive visual memory system to help wearable devices and robots recall past events through videos.
points: The new technology allows physical AI systems like robotics or smart glasses, equipped with cameras for recording video memories of activities performed in the real world.
articles.insight: This innovation can enhance interaction between humans and machines by providing a more natural memory recall mechanism within wearable technologies. It may lead to significant advancterments in robotics, personal devices, accessibility for visually impaired individuals, entertainment applications like video games or virtual reality experiences.

articles.title: Samsung bets this island startup can tame the grid with software and batteries
articles.description: GridBeyond's hardware and software coordinates several gigawatts of supply and demand to help balance the flow of electricity on the grid. The idea has attracted investors like Samsung Ventures.
articles.summary: Samsung invests in GridBeyond, a startup developing software and battery tech to manage electricity supply on the grid.
points: GridBeyond creates hardware/software coordination for balancing electrical flow using batteries
Samsung Ventures funds this island-based innovation with potential impacts across markets
The technology targets integration within existing energy grids to optimize performance
articles.insight: This partnership signals growing interest in software solutions for grid management, potentially revolutionizing how utilities maintain balance between supply and demand.

articles.title: Apple acquires video editing software company MotionVFX
articles.description: The move could help Apple better compete with Adobe Premiere Pro and the Adobe Creative Cloud suite.
articles.summary: Apple has acquired a video editing software company called MotionVFX in an effort to enhance its capabilities against competitors like Adobe Premiere Pro and the broader Creative Cloud suite.
points: The acquisition of MotionVFX by Apple
Intensified competition with Adobe' end-to end video editing solutions, such as Adobe Premiere Pro
Potential to integrate acquired technology into the existing Applications ecosystem.
articles.insight: The acquisition of MotionVFX is strategic for Apple in consolidating its position within both hardware and software realms. This move will potentially boost competition, particularly with Adobe's offerings that have traditionally dominated the video editing market segment.
